name: devp0tion
description: DevP0tion's integrated Claude Code plugin marketplace.

plugins.name: xlmcp
plugins.description: Lets Claude read, edit, and automate Excel spreadsheets for you — from filling in data to building reports. Handles large files fast. Windows only.

plugins.name: team-report
plugins.description: Turns any request — 'review the architecture', 'analyze the color theme' — into a responsive, interactive HTML report built by a team of AI experts sized to the task. You accept, defer, or reject each suggestion, and future reports learn from your choices.

plugins.name: nunchi
plugins.description: Teaches Claude how much effort is 'just enough' for each project. It remembers what was overkill or went wrong, and applies those lessons automatically in every new session. Requires Bun.

plugins.name: nunchi-codex
plugins.description: nunchi for OpenAI Codex CLI (ChatGPT). Same plugin, built from the codex-support branch with the .codex-plugin manifest. After install, trust its hooks via /hooks. Requires Bun.

plugins.name: xlmcp-codex
plugins.description: xlmcp for OpenAI Codex CLI (ChatGPT). Same Excel automation MCP server, built from the codex-support branch with the .codex-plugin manifest. Windows only. Requires Bun.

plugins.name: team-report-codex
plugins.description: team-report for OpenAI Codex CLI (ChatGPT). Same skill, built from the codex-support branch with the .codex-plugin manifest.
